events.title: Private events
events.blurb: Receive requests for weddings, birthdays and corporate events.

corporateMeals.title: Corporate orders
corporateMeals.blurb: Allow reservations assigned to a company (direct invoicing).

standing.title: Recurring reservations
standing.blurb: Accept long-term weekly or fortnightly reservations.

meetingNooks.title: Meeting spaces
meetingNooks.blurb: Set up hourly bookable work spaces.

overview.subtitle: Manage private events and corporate offerings for your venue.

inbox.title: Event requests
inbox.emptyBody: New requests appear here as soon as they are confirmed by email.

detail.subtitle: Request from {guestName} for {eventDate}
detail.overlapWarning: There are {count} regular reservations for this date. Check before accepting.
detail.markAcceptedConfirm: Mark this quote as accepted by the client? You'll then be able to create the reservations.
detail.noActions: No further actions for this {status} request.

materialize.title: Convert to reservation
materialize.subtitle: For {eventDate} · {partySize} guests
materialize.modePrivateHint: · the regular booking grid stays untouched
materialize.modeWholeHint: · block all slots for this date
materialize.noSlots: No slots configured for this day. Enter the time manually.

revenue.title: Revenue estimate
revenue.noBudget: The client did not specify a budget
revenue.footnote: {partySize} guests · ±15% range from the stated budget

spaces.title: Your private spaces
spaces.subtitle: Add the rooms and halls you rent out for events. These appear in the client's request form.
spaces.capacityMinMax: The minimum capacity cannot exceed the maximum capacity.
spaces.deactivateConfirm: Deactivate “{name}”? The space will no longer appear to clients, but the history remains intact.
spaces.emptyBody: Add the rooms or halls you rent out for private events. Clients can select them when they send a request.
spaces.descriptionPlaceholder: Useful details: layout, view, available equipment.

errors.capacityOrder: Maximum capacity must be at least the minimum.

meetingSpaces.title: Meeting spaces
meetingSpaces.subtitle: Hourly bookable work and meeting rooms. They appear on your public page while the capability is on.
meetingSpaces.emptyBody: Add the rooms clients can book by the hour — meeting rooms, work nooks, private desks.
meetingSpaces.deactivateConfirm: Deactivate “{name}”? It stops appearing to clients; existing bookings stay intact.
meetingSpaces.capacityPositive: Capacity must be a positive number.
meetingSpaces.rateInvalid: The hourly rate must be 0 or more.
meetingSpaces.hoursOrder: The opening time must be before the closing time.

companies.subtitle: Companies tagged on this venue's reservations.
companies.empty: No reservations are tagged to a company yet.

meetingBookings.title: Meeting space requests
meetingBookings.subtitle: Confirm or decline hourly booking requests.
meetingBookings.emptyBody: Requests appear here as soon as a client picks a slot.

actions.declinePrompt: Decline this request? The slot becomes available again.
actions.cancelPrompt: Cancel this confirmed booking? The slot becomes available again.

errors.invalidTransition: This action is no longer available for this booking.
errors.slotConflict: Another active booking holds this slot.
